calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Oct-16-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2019 Off Calendar

Application For Entry Of Default Judgment Against Defendants Karen Posey And Dustin Posey
Off Calendar Sep-12-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Karen Posey.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Adriana Robles, CSR #14212. Telephone: 415-551-0332. Email: arobles@sftc.org.

Meghan M. Herning, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Sally Swanson Architects, Inc.
Sally Swanson, owner of Sally Swanson Architects, Inc., was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Karen Posey.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Fiduciary Duty, Fraud, Conversion and Punitive Damages was filed on July 31, 2018 and personally served on defendant Karen Posey on September 19, 2019.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Sophia Duong was filed on August 21, 2018.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Nu Nhi Nguyen was filed on September 17, 2018.
Default as to defendant Karen Posey was entered on November 27, 2018.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Tiffany Posey was filed on November 1, 2018.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 1, 2018.
Dismissal without prejudice as to defendant Dustin Posey and plaintiff's Fourth Cause of Action for Punitive Damages was filed today, September 12, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Sally Swanson Architects, Inc., and against the defaulted defendant Karen Posey, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $284,952.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $34,974.68.
Costs - $1,206.35.

Total - $321,133.03.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
